name: Sunset sail by catamaran from Fornells
description: A catamaran sail from the harbour of Fornells to watch the sun set behind Cap de Cavalleria, with a quiet anchorage for a swim and drinks on board. Silent sailing along the north coast, far from the noise.

highlights: sailing through the northern marine reserve at sunset
dropping anchor in a sheltered cove for a last swim
a toast with drinks and snacks as the sun goes down
